## Problem

What problem would this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the workflow or behavior you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds or other designs have you considered?

## Privacy and storage impact

Does this change involve local files, `.paperview.json`, IndexedDB, OpenAI requests, remote PDFs, or another network service?

## Additional context

Add screenshots, sketches, related papers, examples, or links if helpful.
